movie.actors: Gerard Butler, Christopher Plummer, Jonny Lee Miller, Justine Waddell
movie.plot: In the millenium version of this classic Gothic horror we find Abraham Van Helsing (Plummer), who has tangled with Count Dracula (Butler) in the past, working as an English antiques dealer. Simon (Miller) is a vampire hunter in training under his apprenticeship. Van Helsing and Simon travel from London to New Orleans to rescue Van Helsing's daughter Mary (Waddell) from the family's life long nemesis - Dracula.
movie.title: Dracula 2000
movie.writer: Joel Soisson (story), Patrick Lussier (story), Joel Soisson (screenplay)
